name: ui-json-bridge-ai
description: AI workflow skills for creating Unreal Engine UMG UI with UIJsonBridge JSON.

interface.shortDescription: AI-assisted UE UMG JSON UI creation.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex skills for designing, refining, and safely importing Unreal Engine UMG Widget Blueprint layouts through UIJsonBridge JSON, including Blueprint variable preservation, CJK font handling, parent-child UI composition, and SizeBox text constraints.
defaultPrompt: 制作 UE 的 UI，并保留蓝图变量名。
根据参考图修改 UMG JSON 布局。
为父 UI 引用子 UI 设计布局。
